title: HTML Comments
content:
### HTML Comments Comments are **not displayed** in the browser. They help document your code. --- ### Comment Syntax ```html ``` Everything between `` is ignored by the browser. --- ### Single Line Comments ```html

This content is visible.

``` --- ### Multi-Line Comments ```html ``` --- ### Hiding Content Temporarily Comments can **hide code** without deleting it: ```html

Visible paragraph

``` --- ### HTML Conditional Comments Older versions of IE supported conditional comments: ```html ``` > **Note:** Conditional comments are obsolete. Do not use them in modern websites. --- ### Comment Best Practices | Do | Do Not | |----|--------| | Explain **complex** logic | State the obvious | | Mark **TODO** items | Comment out large blocks permanently | | Note **browser quirks** | Leave outdated comments | | Describe **intent** | Comment every line | > **Key Point:** Comments are not hidden from view -- anyone can see them in **View Page Source**. Do not put sensitive info in comments!
codeExample:
This paragraph is visible.

More visible content.

quiz.question: What is the correct HTML comment syntax?
